Re-adjudication Request for Claim Invoice 73169
Patient: AHMED IBRAHIM - (MRN: 22418)
Visit Date: 2026-01-16 00:00:00
Diagnosis: I50-Heart failure,E87-Other disorders of fluid, electrolyte and acid-base balance

MEDICATION NOT REGISTERED (1 line(s)):
  The medications listed below were clinically necessary for patient care.
  These medications are approved by SFDA and were administered under physician
  supervision based on established clinical protocols.
  Request: Review and approve based on clinical necessity and SFDA registration status.
  - Seq 29: 99999999999999 - SMOFKABIVEN CENTRAL LINE EXTRA NITROGEN 1518 ML BAG X 4 (SAR 442.1)

MEDICAL NECESSITY (5 line(s)):
  The services below were medically necessary based on patient condition
  and diagnosis: I50-Heart failure,E87-Other disorders of fluid, electrolyte and acid-base balance.
  Supporting clinical documentation is available upon request.
  Request: Approve based on the documented clinical indication.
  - Seq 27: 05999057200363 - HUMAN ALBUMIN 20% SOLUTION FOR INFUSION (SAR 493.35)
  - Seq 25: 05999057200363 - HUMAN ALBUMIN 20% SOLUTION FOR INFUSION (SAR 493.35)
  - Seq 23: 05999057200363 - HUMAN ALBUMIN 20% SOLUTION FOR INFUSION (SAR 493.35)
  - Seq 21: 05999057200363 - HUMAN ALBUMIN 20% SOLUTION FOR INFUSION (SAR 493.35)
  - Seq 19: 05999057200363 - HUMAN ALBUMIN 20% SOLUTION FOR INFUSION (SAR 493.35)

QUANTITY EXCEEDED (2 line(s)):
  The quantities billed reflect the actual services provided based on clinical need.
  Extended treatment was required due to patient condition complexity.
  Request: Review and approve the actual quantities administered.
  - Seq 16: MOHAPSB001 Qty=1 (SAR 347.78)
  - Seq 14: MOHAPSB001 Qty=1 (SAR 347.78)

TARIFF ADJUSTMENT (2 line(s), total difference: 0.02 SAR):
  The rejected amounts represent rounding differences of 0.01 SAR per line item.
  Per the agreed tariff schedule between Hayat National Hospital-ABHA and
  Ministry of Health, these amounts are within the contractual tolerance.
  Request: Accept the claimed amounts as per the agreed tariff rates.
  - Seq 4: MOHS-AD131 Claimed=1905.72 Approved=1905.71 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 2: MOHS-AD123 Claimed=1732.23 Approved=1732.22 Diff=0.01

---
